tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]C7[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]C7[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 I know you've come a long way baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                                [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]F6[/ch]
 But you don't need that heart of stone, no[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 You proved that you could do it do it baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
 You can make it on your own[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 But you can't keep runnin away from love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
 Cause the first one let you down, no no no[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 And though others try to satisfy you baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]        [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
 With me true love can still be found,  love can  still be found[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
The second time around[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]F6[/ch]
Ooh, the second time is so much better baby[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
The second time around[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                                [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]F6[/ch]
 And I'll make it better than the first time[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 You know I really love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]        [ch]F6[/ch]
 And I paid for my mis-takes, yes I did girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 The more I try to hide my feelings baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]              [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
 This old heart gets in the way,    and love won't  let me wait[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
The second time around[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C7[/ch]                      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]F6[/ch]
Girl with me it's better than the first time[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]C7[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
The second time around, let's do it one more time,      say it again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]C7[/ch]
The second time around, all that I've been through I'll do it again[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]F6[/ch]
Just as long as I'm with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
The second time around[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]             [ch]Absus4[/ch]
 Oh the second time[/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F6[/ch]  [ch]Abmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Abmaj7[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]              [ch]Ab/C[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
     Ahah                    Ah ah ah ah ah  Ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]C7[/ch]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]F6[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Ooooh,     I'll make it so good to you babe[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]F6[/ch]
 I'll make it so good to you[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Not like the first time[/tab]
              (Not like the first time)
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Not like the first time[/tab]
              (Not like the first time)
[tab]             [ch]C7[/ch]                           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]F6[/ch]
Not like the first time, talking 'bout the, second time[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Not like the first time[/tab]
              (Not like the first time)
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Not like the first time[/tab]
              (Not like the first time)
[tab]             [ch]C7[/ch]                           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]F6[/ch]
Not like the first time, talking 'bout the, second time[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 You can't keep runnin away from love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
 Cause the first one let you down[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 And though others try to satisfy you baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]  [ch]Abmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
 With me true love can still be foooooo - uuuuuund[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
The second time around[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C7[/ch]                            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
I'm gonna keep you mine the second time baby[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]C7[/ch]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]F6[/ch]
The second time around, I'll know what to do just as long as I'm with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]C7[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
The second time around, do it one more time,     say it again[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
The second time around[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C7[/ch]                            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
Gonna keep you mine the second time baby[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
The second time around[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C7[/ch]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
So in love, so in lo -  ve[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]C7[/ch]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch]
The second time around,  Ohhhhhhh[/tab]
